note: Tier-1 ERP pill manifest for erp.html. fn/isActive bound BY ID in erp_pills.js (functions are not JSON). icon: '@bim' = adopt the icon the BIM registry binds for that id; a bare name = a glyph in icons.js (verbatim from panels.js); img = a real asset file. Curated for the ERP surface: BIM-only pills (e.g. tm) removed; read/search/maximize added. Every icon resolves from the verbatim set — nothing inlined.

pills.name: Read
pills.note: read / view the focused record (eye glyph)

pills.name: Report
pills.note: ERP financial Report (Receipt/Trial Balance/P&L). DISTINCT id — NOT BIM report=4D/5D.

pills.name: Editable
pills.note: placeholder glyph (closest existing) — a 'pencil' glyph TBD

pills.name: iDempiere-like UI
pills.note: ETHICS: the user's neutral A+ raster (aplus.png) — NEVER the trademarked iDempiere logo (IDEMPIERE_PILL_HANDOFF.md, IDEMPIERE_2.md §Guardrails 3). Renderer #1 = idempiere.html.

pills.name: Glassbowl
pills.note: on-brand crystal/gem (existing 'rosetta' glyph repurposed) — the engine-as-data lens / glass bowl

pills.name: Gravity
pills.note: central mass + orbiting satellites (existing 'disciplines' glyph repurposed) = a gravity / orbit system
